context.brief_excerpt:
SELF-EVOLUTION ROTATION C — Build per-cron silent-fire 7d trending capability.

CONTEXT
The detector script `scripts/cron-silent-fire-detector.js` runs hourly via crontab (see file header). It writes a single status_board row "cron silent-fire detector — rolling report" that gets UPDATED in place each run (entity_ref='cron_silent_fire_detector'). The status_board row keeps only the latest snapshot. There is currently no historical record of per-task verdicts over time — so we cannot answer

Fix the cron-silent-fire-detector false-positive class. Status board P2 row 0df47f4b reports "6 suspected silent fires" — all 6 are CONDITIONAL deliverables ("Exit silent on healthy, write status_board only if errors>0"), but the detector's signal regex matches `MUST update status_board` regardless of conditional context.
